user.title: BToddB Reminders
user.description: BToddB Reminders are delivered through the BToddB Notifications integration.

data_description.calendar_name: Name for the calendar entity (e.g. "BToddB Reminders"). Determines the entity_id.

error.invalid_snooze_durations: Enter one or more whole numbers of at least 1, separated by commas.

data_description.snooze_durations: Comma-separated snooze durations in minutes (e.g. "15, 60"). These appear as snooze action buttons on delivered time-based notifications (HA Companion mobile app only).

create.name: Create reminder
create.description: Add a time-based reminder at an absolute time, a relative delay, or a recurring daily/weekly/monthly schedule.

message.name: Message
message.description: What to remind about, in the user's own words.

when.name: When
when.description: Absolute ISO 8601 local datetime for a specific clock time or date. Leave empty for relative delays and use in_minutes instead.

in_minutes.name: In minutes
in_minutes.description: Minutes from now, for relative delays. Takes priority over when when both are given.

rrule.name: Recurrence rule
rrule.description: RRULE string for recurring reminders (FREQ=DAILY, FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=MO, FREQ=MONTHLY;BYMONTHDAY=15, FREQ=MONTHLY;BYMONTHDAY=-1 for the last day, or FREQ=MONTHLY;BYDAY=1FR for an ordinal weekday). After each delivery the next occurrence is scheduled automatically.

update.name: Update reminder
update.description: Edit an existing time-based reminder by uid.

uid.name: UID
uid.description: The unique id of the reminder to update.

message.name: Message
message.description: Replacement reminder text. Omit to leave unchanged.

when.name: When
when.description: New absolute ISO 8601 local datetime. Omit to leave unchanged.

in_minutes.name: In minutes
in_minutes.description: New relative delay in minutes from now. Omit to leave unchanged.

rrule.name: Recurrence rule
rrule.description: New RRULE (FREQ=DAILY, FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=MO, FREQ=MONTHLY;BYMONTHDAY=15, etc.). Pass empty or null to clear. Omit to leave unchanged.

create_location.name: Create location reminder
create_location.description: Add a reminder delivered the moment a person enters or leaves a zone. Fires once, then stays visible for 7 days.

message.name: Message
message.description: What to remind about, in the user's own words.

person.name: Person
person.description: The person entity whose location triggers the reminder.

trigger.name: Trigger
trigger.description: Deliver when the person enters the zone, or when they leave it.

delete_location.name: Delete location reminder
delete_location.description: Remove a location reminder by its unique id.

uid.name: UID
uid.description: The unique id of the location reminder to delete.

snooze.name: Snooze reminder
snooze.description: Reschedule a time-based reminder to fire again after a delay.

uid.name: UID
uid.description: The unique id of the reminder to snooze.

minutes.name: Minutes
minutes.description: How many minutes to delay the re-delivery.
